title: MAP 6.13: Verify formal invariants, multi-project fit, roster, and assumptions
description: Wave 9 from MAP 6.13 plan. Run the verification and audit pass: narrow formal invariant spike, MAST-style failure coverage, multi-project readiness, roster composition, and adversarial assumption red-team. Read MAP_System/artifacts/planning/map-613-master-implementation-plan.md, Guidelines/6.13/MAP-System/04-MAP-Formal-Verification.md, Guidelines/6.13/MAP-Gap-Register.md, MAP_System/Projects/Pathwell references via docs/project-map.md, MAP_System/tests, and MAP_System/scripts before editing.
acceptance_criteria: Formal invariant spike covers allocator, task claim, and git lock with TLA+ or executable state-machine tests, and states limits of design-vs-implementation proof.
Failure taxonomy coverage maps known MAP validators/tests to multi-agent failure classes and identifies missing regression tests.
Multi-project readiness audit distinguishes global vs project-local state and covers Pathwell plus at least one other project shape.
Roster composition audit compares two-tier vs three-tier routing and agent count per tier without registering new agents by itself.
Assumption red-team challenges design assumptions, not just parameter values, and routes findings to Research, Risk, Self-Repair, or task backlog.
